meta.title: Five Blind People and an Elephant called ICS Supply Chain Security
meta.description: Eric Byres of aDolus briefly lays out the ICS supply chain problem, and then he dives into what aDolus is doing to help solve it. Their FACT score tells asset owners how trustworthy software and firmware is. It is a DHS funded project and is live now.
